reason: Check global Stage1/Stage2, stack, and source/descriptor authority invariants.
Check RVV route operand binding remains plugin-owned and typed-body-driven.
Check common EmitC materializer stays neutral and only consumes provider-built route payload.
Check ABI roles remain declarations and selected RVV body consumes them explicitly.
Check provider/mirror boundaries and fail-closed metadata-only cases.
Check selected variant and emission-plan metadata are mirrors only.
Check positive/negative tests and ssh rvv evidence match touched behavior.
Check implementation against this task's bounded acceptance criteria.
